--- Round 1 --- The user is asking me to list the '营业总成本' (total operating costs) for each company in increasing order. I'm currently processing DOC2, which is a 2024 Q1 report. I need to find the '营业总成本' value in this document. This would typically be found in the income statement (利润表). Looking at the document structure, section [5.1.2] 合并利润表 (Consolidated Income Statement) is the most likely place to find this information.
